title: Soft Disagreement
description: 今天练习不生硬地表达保留意见：先承认对方有道理，再给出自己的判断。

items.phrase: I see where you're coming from.
items.cn: 先承认对方出发点，再接自己的看法。适合会议、讨论和朋友聊天。
examples: I see where you're coming from, but I'm not sure that solves the main issue.
I see where you're coming from. I just think the timing is tricky.
dialogue: We should wait until everything is perfect.
I see where you're coming from, but we might lose momentum.
